description_long: This is an L-shaped kitchen cabinetry set featuring both upper and lower cabinets, designed to fit into a corner space. The cabinetry is predominantly white with a marble-patterned countertop, providing a clean and modern aesthetic. The lower section includes multiple drawers, a built-in oven, and a cooktop, while the upper section offers ample storage with several doors. There is a dedicated sink area on the right side, and the cabinetry extends to a small peninsula or side counter. The handles are minimalistic, likely bar pulls, contributing to the contemporary look. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for residential or commercial kitchen installations.
description: L-shaped modern kitchen cabinetry with white finish, marble countertop, and integrated appliances. Features upper and lower storage, a sink, and minimalistic handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, upper and lower cabinets, built-in oven, cooktop, sink, and marble countertop.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid end panel of the cabinetry, with no visible doors or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panels of the cabinetry, with no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Angled side view revealing the depth of the cabinetry, the corner configuration, and partial visibility of the countertop and storage.
attribute_cabinet_type: L-shaped kitchen base and wall cabinet set
